domain: Hovercraft air cushion — lift fan + skirt create pressurized air cushion eliminating ground friction; vehicle floats on continuous low-pressure pad.
specific_mechanism: Continuous fan-pressurized air cushion separates hull from ground; pressure delta produces lift; skirt traps cushion; near-zero friction with any underlying surface.
llm_application: HOVER-ATTN: insert a constant-rank pressure-pad operator P ∈ ℝ^(r×d) (r << d) between Q·K^T and softmax. The pad maintains a constant separation/normalization budget while reducing O(n²) full attention to O(n·r) intermediate. Conceptually: Q and K never directly 'rub' against each other; they interact through the cushion pad.
novelty_claim: Performer (FAVOR kernel), Linformer (low-rank projection), RALA (rank-augmented linear), A3 (analytical low-rank), CPA (priority-driven). HOVER-ATTN is a re-framing of the constant-rank intermediate — but the operational mechanism is essentially low-rank attention which is mainstream.
